message:
Fix clippy errors and test ID extraction

- orphans.rs: Replace `.unwrap()` with proper error handling via `.map_err()`
  to fix missing_panics_doc clippy warning
- main.rs: Merge match arms in should_auto_import() to fix match_same_arms
  clippy warning
- e2e_comments_stdin.rs: Update ID extraction to account for "✓" prefix in
  success messages (word index 1 -> 2)
- e2e_env_overrides.rs: Update strip_prefix("Created ") to
  strip_prefix("✓ Created ") to match actual output format

Also created bead beads_rust-2c4y to track pre-existing test failures in
e2e_errors.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -155,7 +155,10 @@ const fn is_mutating_command(cmd: &Commands) -> bool {
 
 const fn should_auto_import(cmd: &Commands) -> bool {
     match cmd {
-        // Read-only commands
+        // Commands that need auto-import:
+        // - Read-only commands (to ensure fresh data)
+        // - Mutating commands (to avoid overwriting external changes)
+        // - Subcommands (Comments, Dep, Label, Epic, Query)
         Commands::List(_)
         | Commands::Show { .. }
         | Commands::Search(_)
@@ -168,26 +171,22 @@ const fn should_auto_import(cmd: &Commands) -> bool {
         | Commands::Status(_)
         | Commands::Orphans(_)
         | Commands::Changelog(_)
-        | Commands::Graph(_) => true,
-
-        // Mutating commands (should import to avoid overwriting external changes)
-        Commands::Create(_)
+        | Commands::Graph(_)
+        | Commands::Create(_)
         | Commands::Update(_)
         | Commands::Delete(_)
         | Commands::Close(_)
         | Commands::Reopen(_)
         | Commands::Q(_)
         | Commands::Defer(_)
-        | Commands::Undefer(_) => true,
-
-        // Subcommands
-        Commands::Comments(_) => true, // Covers Add and List
-        Commands::Dep { .. } => true,  // Covers Add, Remove, List, Tree, Cycles
-        Commands::Label { .. } => true,// Covers Add, Remove, List, ListAll, Rename
-        Commands::Epic { .. } => true, // Covers Status, CloseEligible
-        Commands::Query { .. } => true,// Covers Save, Run, List, Delete
+        | Commands::Undefer(_)
+        | Commands::Comments(_)
+        | Commands::Dep { .. }
+        | Commands::Label { .. }
+        | Commands::Epic { .. }
+        | Commands::Query { .. } => true,
 
-        // Explicitly excluded
+        // Explicitly excluded: init, sync, diagnostic, and config commands
         Commands::Init { .. }
         | Commands::Sync(_)
         | Commands::Doctor
@@ -196,7 +195,7 @@ const fn should_auto_import(cmd: &Commands) -> bool {
         | Commands::Version(_)
         | Commands::Upgrade(_)
         | Commands::Completions(_)
-        | Commands::Audit { .. } // Audit is append-only JSONL, usually local
+        | Commands::Audit { .. }
         | Commands::Config { .. }
         | Commands::History(_)
         | Commands::Agents(_) => false,

@@ -303,12 +303,13 @@ fn e2e_actor_flag_overrides_env() {
     let create = run_br(&workspace, ["create", "Flag override test"], "create");
     assert!(create.status.success(), "create failed: {}", create.stderr);
 
+    // Output is "✓ Created bd-abc123: Flag override test"
     let id = create
         .stdout
         .lines()
         .next()
         .unwrap_or("")
-        .strip_prefix("Created ")
+        .strip_prefix("✓ Created ")
         .and_then(|s| s.split(':').next())
         .unwrap_or("")
         .trim();
